chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3999 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.17359/2022 2. For hearing of CMA No.17360/2022 3. For hearing of main case 28.02.2025 Mr. Fahad Ali Hashmi, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent, taken on record and waives notice. It is jointly stated that this controversy is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2021 PTD 971, therefore, in reliance upon the reasoning assigned therein this petition may also be disposed of upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
